title: Verify Editable Demo Sandbox, Clone, and Feature Introduction
objective: Produce complete Emulator, Vitest, Playwright, accessibility, persistence, isolation, and residual-risk evidence for the reviewed Amendment implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify Demo edits persist after reload and Reset restores the immutable current source template.
Verify Reset does not affect myTrips, Offline Cache, onboarding state, or real Firebase trips.
Verify itinerary add/edit/delete/reorder, time/note changes, and all approved Checklist actions.
Verify source template remains unchanged across edit, reload, Reset, and Clone.
Verify zero Firebase, Storage, myTrips, and Offline Cache writes on Demo open, edit, persistence, and Reset.
Verify Clone uses the edited validated snapshot and every forbidden-data exclusion remains effective.
Verify Clone feature flag is disabled by default and technical writes use only Firebase Emulator.
Verify Lobby 功能介紹, Settings 功能介紹, and the existing Settings 功能導覽 all exist with distinct behavior.
Verify replay does not change onboarding eligibility or completion state.
Run Desktop Chrome, Mobile Safari, complete Vitest, and complete Playwright regression and report commit, counts, skips, failures, and remaining risks.
